title: WAIS: Extract session module
description: Extract DPoP keypair, token cache, and site cache into `wais_mcp/session.py`

title: WAIS: Better error handling for HTTP 500s
description: Catch httpx errors and return response body when available instead of generic raise_for_status. Apply to all tools.

title: WAIS: Verify all modules parse and imports are correct
description: Final syntax and import verification after all changes.

title: WAIS: Design WAISClient class
description: Create wais_mcp/client.py with WAISClient class that wraps auth, session, manifest, polling into a clean async API: discover, register, execute, confirm, status. Should be usable standalone without MCP.

title: WAIS: Refactor tools to use WAISClient
description: Update the 5 tool modules to delegate to WAISClient instead of calling session/auth/polling directly. Tools become thin wrappers.

title: WAIS: Add SDK usage examples to README
description: Add a "Usage without MCP" section to README showing how to use WAISClient directly from Python.

title: WAIS: Verify SDK imports and syntax
description: Final verification that all modules parse, imports are correct, and WAISClient works as standalone.

title: WAIS: Update server.py as entrypoint
description: Slim down server.py to just FastMCP setup, imports from modules, and tool registration

title: WAIS: Add README
description: Add README.md with quick start, Claude Desktop config, and tool descriptions

title: WAIS: Create WAISManifest class in wais-pod stub
description: Create a local pod/manifest.py with the WAISManifest class so wais-mcp can import it. Includes from_url, from_dict, resolve_endpoint, get_action, list_actions, get_effective_risk, get_required_scopes, get_all_scopes, is_async, get_resolution, get_registration_claims.

title: WAIS: Replace session.py helpers with WAISManifest
description: Replace inline get_site_url, get_api_base_url, get_actions, find_action, get_all_scopes in session.py with WAISManifest methods. Update store_site and get_site_data to use WAISManifest.

title: WAIS: Update tools to use WAISManifest
description: Update discover, register, execute, confirm, status tools to use WAISManifest instead of raw dict access.
